title: Imperial Customs Corvette
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{StarshipClass |image=[[File:ImperialCustomsCorvette-SotGSE.png]] |name=Imperial Customs Corvette |designer= |manufacturer=[[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]]''[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters]]'' |line= |model=Light Corvette |type=[[Corvette/Legends|Corvette]] |cost=*Not legally available for sale.[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] *[[Black market/Legends|Black market]] cost varies based on market conditions.''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'' |modifier= |sysmods= |length=180 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed=1,050 [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|kph]] |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive=*Class 2.0 *Class 8.0 {{C|backup}} |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=[[Deflector shield generator/Legends|Shield generator]] equipped |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation=[[Navigation computer/Legends|Navigation computer]] equipped |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=Double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Turret/Legends|turrets]] (6) |complement= |bays=No onboard craft capacity; multiple external docking systems |escapepods= |crew=*Crew (52) *[[Gunner/Legends|Gunners]] (6) |skeleton=18 |passengers=20 {{C|[[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]}} |capacity=500 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] |cargohandling= |consumables=2 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] {{C|can be extended mid-mission through capture operations}} |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability=*Legal: military only *Black market: available from [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowports]] |role=*Picket *Patrol |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Rodian Home Fleet]] *[[Pirate/Legends|Pirates]]''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' }} {{Quote|A single Imperial Customs corvette approaching. They're hailing us.''"
"''Let's hear what they have to say.|[[Minna]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|{{InsiderCite|145|Constant Spirit (short story)}}}} The [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] '''light corvette''', commonly known as the '''Imperial Customs Corvette''', was a light [[Starship/Legends|starship]] commonly used for patrol and inspection actions. ==History== The [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs Office]] employed a force of patrol vessels that operated independently from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in order to spare the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] government the expense of assigning ships of the line to monitor shipping, interdict [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]], and perform search-and-rescue operations. [[File:LightCorvetteClass720Freighter-PlattsStarportGuide.jpg|thumb|left|Light Corvette docked with a [[720 light freighter/Legends|Class 720 freighter]]]] Rendili StarDrive's light corvette was the backbone of this force. Systems with an Imperial Customs branch generally had at least one of these vessels, and more important systems had several. While it was not capable of taking on large [[Warship/Legends|warships]], these ships were more than adequate for taking on most [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] or [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. For boarding operations, the corvette carried a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] platoon. They were often supported by the smaller [[Imperial Customs Frigate|Imperial Customs frigate]], also a Rendili product. Rendili StarDrive sold the Light Corvette to the Imperial Customs Office by an exclusive contract, but smaller governmental organizations, such as the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Rodian Home Fleet|Home Fleet]], also acquired the light corvette for system patrol and defense.''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]'' The utility and efficiency of these craft also created a demand from less legal organizations. Pirates often made an effort to capture light corvettes, and smaller shipbuilding operations such as those at [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowports]] manufactured copies of the design. The [[Pyesmev]], a vessel belonging to the [[pirate]] group [[Solar Terrors]], is an example for such a copy.{{WEGCite|book=The Far Orbit Project|story=The Rival}} One corvette, the [[Gatekeeper (Imperial Customs corvette)|''Gatekeeper'']], tried to [[Mission to Quellor|intercept]] a young [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] at [[Quellor/Legends|Quellor]], but it was destroyed in a suicide attack by a [[Rafe Ballon|resistance fighter]] in order to maintain her cover. Right after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], a customs vessel arrived at [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] bearing news of the Imperial defeat to the [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]].{{WEGCite|story=The Passage From Perdition|book=Mos Eisley Adventure Set}} ==Appearances== *''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}} *{{InsiderCite|145|Constant Spirit (short
